ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>The response shows empathy and understanding of the player's urgency but lacks some naturalness in phrasing, slightly affecting persona consistency.
baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>5<TAB>Responses are well-considered and maintain a consistent persona as the priest but could be more contextually relevant to improve overall quality.
